deploy.startCommand: bash -lc 'rm -f /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/mpm_event.load /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/mpm_event.conf /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/mpm_worker.load /etc/apache2/mods-enabled/mpm_worker.conf && a2enmod mpm_prefork rewrite >/dev/null && sed -ri "s/^Listen 80$/Listen 8000/" /etc/apache2/ports.conf && sed -ri "s/<VirtualHost \*:80>/<VirtualHost *:8000>/" /etc/apache2/sites-enabled/000-default.conf && exec apache2-foreground'
